question: Who was the CEO of the AI customer service company Salesforce agreed to acquire in June 2026?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The company was **Fin** (formerly known as Intercom), an AI customer-service agent platform that Salesforce agreed to acquire for $3.6 billion, announced June 15, 2026. Its CEO is **Eoghan McCabe**, co-founder and CEO of Intercom/Fin.

Sources:
- https://www.salesforce.com/news/press-releases/2026/06/15/salesforce-signs-definitive-agreement-to-acquire-fin/
- https://techcrunch.com/2026/06/15/salesforce-acquires-ai-customer-service-platform-fin-for-3-6b/
- https://www.cnbc.com/2026/06/15/salesforce-ai-customer-service-fin-acquistion.html

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: The CEO was **Eoghan McCabe**, CEO of **Fin (formerly Intercom)**. Salesforce agreed to acquire Fin for $3.6 billion in June 2026.
